name: GALM / Divall Drift Chassis
description: Build manuals for Overdose's premium RWD drift chassis - GALM, GALM ver.2, Divall and XEX.
notes: Reference card: a chassis kit, not software. Overdose makes no programmable electronics, so there is nothing to install. Manuals are Japanese but are diagram-driven exploded views, and large (8-24 MB). The manufacturer is Weld Techniques Factory at weld-jp.com - overdose.co.jp does not resolve and overdoserc.com is an unrelated parts shop. Their index page emits http:// links; the https forms all work and are used here.
